name: MMC5983 Magnetometer
description: The `mmc5983` component allows you to use your MMC5983 triple-axis magnetometer ([datasheet](https://www.memsic.com/Public/Uploads/uploadfile/files/20220119/MMC5983MADatasheetRevA.pdf), [SparkFun](https://www.sparkfun.com/products/19921)) with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to check the sensor. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: Field Strength X
config_entries.description: The information for the X-axis field sensor. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: Field Strength Y
config_entries.description: The information for the Y-axis field sensor. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).

config_entries.label: Field Strength Z
config_entries.description: The information for the Z-axis field sensor. All options from [Sensor](https://esphome.io/components/sensor).
